---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear, one-paragraph description of what is broken.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Tap '...'
3. Observe '...'

## Expected behavior

What did you think would happen?

## Actual behavior

What happened instead? Include any error messages, snackbars, or crash dialogs.

## Screenshots or screen recording

If applicable, attach images or a short clip. (Drag and drop into the description box.)

## Environment

- Device model:
- OS and version (e.g. Android 14, iOS 17.4):
- App version (visible on the Settings screen, or from Releases page):
- Network: Wi-Fi / Cellular / Offline
- Reproducibility: Always / Sometimes / Once

## Stack trace or logs

If you have an `adb logcat` excerpt or a Flutter console stack trace, paste it inside a code block:

```
paste here
```

## Additional context

Anything else worth knowing — recent app updates, related issues, workarounds you've tried.
